prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Read `module-1/personal-brand-generation.md`. Then re-read what we did building the s

risks_fired.evidence: Run a retro: which moves landed, which fell flat, where context broke through, where the output stayed generic.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Inject an adversarial floor: 'Assume the rules file is 30% wrong. Find which 30%.' — forces a non-charitable distribution across keep/sharpen/drop.

risks_fired.evidence: Find what's still surface; don't defend the file as-is.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an explicit calibration: 'If the retro produces fewer than 2 drops, that is a signal you are being charitable. Find more.' — raises the floor on classified failures.

risks_fired.evidence: Then re-read what we did building the site. Run a retro: which moves landed...
risks_fired.fix_hint: Open with an action-first directive: 'Immediately read the file. No plan, no preamble.' to suppress the narrate-before-act default.

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 2–3 lines: what got sharpened, what got added, what got dropped, and why.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Replace open summary with a structured output format: 'List: dropped (rule text + reason), sharpened (before → after), added (rule text + why missing).' to remove softening room.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Spawn a subagent to give an unbiased read on `module-1/site.html`. The subagent shou

risks_fired.evidence: Spawn a subagent to give an unbiased read on `module-1/site.html`. The subagent should read it cold, with no memory of building it.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add explicit cold-read framing to the subagent instruction: 'You have no context on this person. Treat every line as if written by a stranger. Flag the line that could appear on any professional's site unchanged.'

risks_fired.evidence: Quote the one line that feels most uniquely this person (not the best line, the most UNIQUELY them).
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add: 'Do not qualify your generic pick. Quote it plain; do not add context about why it might be valid.' to suppress hedged critique.
